title: Nucor Corp Is Simply Impressive
text: Nucor Corp. stock has risen 23% in the past three months, outperforming its peers. The company's focus on recycling and low emissions has contributed to its success and attracted customers in industries prioritizing sustainability. Nucor's strong financial performance and strategic focus on sustainability position it well for long-term growth.

title: A Coalition Led by Nucor Publishes The Global Steel Standard to Measure and Report Greenhouse Emissions
text: CHARLOTTE, N.C. , Aug. 3, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Nucor Corporation (NYSE: NUE) continues to spearhead sustainability efforts in the steel industry as a founding member of the Global Steel Climate Council (GSCC), which released The Steel Climate Standard—a global standard to measure and report carbon emissions in the global steel industry.
